generated_exposure.exposure_text: New security measures are working! Just last month, our local intelligence teams stopped a potential attack using expanded domestic surveillance powers. Critics say these measures infringe on civil liberties, but how can we protect ourselves if we don't know who the threats are? It's time to prioritize national security over outdated concerns. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFuture
